name: PermitIQ
description: Real-time Austin Texas building permit data for AI agents and developers. Query 2.35 million permits by location, value, type and date.

tools.name: get_recent_permits
tools.description: Get the most recent building permits issued in Austin Texas. Filter by zip code. Returns permit type, address, contractor, valuation, and date.

zip.description: Austin zip code to filter by e.g. 78701

limit.description: Number of results to return. Default 10 max 50.

tools.name: get_high_value_permits
tools.description: Get high value building permits in Austin Texas above a minimum dollar threshold. Useful for finding luxury construction and major developments.

min.description: Minimum permit valuation in dollars. Default 500000.

limit.description: Number of results to return. Default 10 max 50.
